notes: TonB-dependent iron siderophore receptor; mediates Fe cycling; Fe availability affects water quality

es_name: Controlling the chemical quality of freshwater
notes: fur ferric uptake regulator; master regulator of Fe homeostasis

es_name: Controlling the chemical quality of freshwater
notes: cbiM cobalt/nickel transporter permease; Co import for B12 biosynthesis

es_name: Controlling the chemical quality of freshwater
notes: cbiO cobalt/nickel transporter ATPase; B12 precursor acquisition

es_name: Controlling the chemical quality of freshwater
notes: amtB ammonium transporter; removes dissolved NH4 from freshwater; N cycling
GST glutathione S-transferase; conjugates xenobiotics for detox; broad substrate (pesticides, metals, organics)
ALDH aldehyde dehydrogenase NAD+; oxidizes toxic aldehydes from pollutant breakdown
fadD long-chain acyl-CoA synthetase; activates fatty acids for beta-oxidation; hydrocarbon/oil remediation
fadL long-chain fatty acid transporter; imports hydrophobic pollutants for degradation

es_name: Ensuring the organic matter in our soils is maintained
notes: galE UDP-glucose 4-epimerase; produces UDP-galactose for EPS; biofilm contributes to soil aggregate stability

es_name: Ensuring the organic matter in our soils is maintained
notes: ugd UDPglucose 6-dehydrogenase; UDP-glucuronate for EPS; biofilm matrix stabilizes soil
virB4 type IV secretion system ATPase; conjugative DNA transfer; ARG dissemination facilitator
